title: GoLay
description: The simple mod that allows you to crawl on button or commands
body:
# GoLay It's the [GoProne](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goprone)-like mod, but it's made for Fabric and newer minecraft versions. It's not a port or fork, so code is completely written by me. ## What is it for? This mod allows you to crawl by pressing the button *(default: 'C')* or typing the /lay command. Yes, it makes you 1 block height, allowing you to crawl through narrow gaps. ## Usage You can use binding *(button 'C')* to switch between crawling and not-crawling mode.
Also you can use these commands: - /lay - to lay - /unlay - to stand up ## Credits This mod is made by **MiraDiv** and is under the [**MIT**](https://github.com/MiraDiv-git/GoLay-Mod-Fabric/blob/main/LICENSE) license, so you're free to modify it in any way you want as long as you credit me as the original author.
